small.label: Starting Sacred Water
small.text: Gain (30-59) Sacred Water at the start of the Trial

small.label: Relic Quantity
small.text: (6-20)% increased quantity of Relics dropped by Monsters

small.label: Double Sacred Water (Monsters)
small.text: Monsters have (5-15)% chance to drop double Sacred Water

small.label: Slow Resistance
small.text: (8-20)% reduced Slowing Potency of Debuffs on You

small.label: Crit Damage Taken Reduction
small.text: Hits against you have (12-25)% reduced Critical Damage Bonus

small.label: Key Quantity
small.text: (6-25)% increased quantity of Keys dropped by Monsters

small.label: Double Sacred Water (Fountains)
small.text: Fountains have (5-15)% chance to grant double Sacred Water

medium.label: Extra Merchant Choice
medium.text: The Merchant has an additional Choice

medium.label: Honour on Boss Kill
medium.text: Restore (40-150) Honour on killing a Boss

medium.label: Honour on Shrine
medium.text: Restore (25-75) Honour on venerating a Maraketh Shrine

medium.label: Rooms Revealed
medium.text: (1-2) additional Rooms are revealed on the Trial Map

large.label: Cheat Death Chance
large.text: (5-12)% chance if you were to lose all your Honour to have 1 Honour instead

large.label: Monster Speed Reduction
large.text: Monsters have (4-7)% reduced Attack, Cast and Movement Speed

large.label: Key Upgrade Chance
large.text: (3-9)% chance for each of your Keys to upgrade on completing a Floor

large.label: Extra Key Chance
large.text: When you gain a Key (7-16)% chance to gain another

large.label: Avoid Affliction Chance
large.text: (6-15)% chance to Avoid gaining an Affliction

large.label: Honour on Key Pickup
large.text: Restore (25-75) Honour on picking up a Key

large.label: Rooms Revealed
large.text: (2-4) additional Rooms are revealed on the Trial Map

large.label: Sacred Water per Room
large.text: Gain (11-30) Sacred Water when you complete a Room
